title: AP RFP — Digital Signature for E-Procurement Submission
text_english: Each Bidder (and in case of a Consortium, the LEAD MEMBER) MUST USE the DIGITAL SIGNATURE of its AUTHORISED SIGNATORY while uploading the SOFT COPY of the Qualification Proposal AND Financial Proposal to the E-Procurement Portal. The maximum FILE SIZE of each file uploaded by the Bidder as part of its Bid SHALL NOT EXCEED {{max_file_mb}} MB (default 5 MB). The digital signature SHALL be issued by a certifying authority licensed under the Information Technology Act, 2000 and SHALL be VALID on the Bid Due Date.
